site.title: Element World
site.subtitle: 元素世界
site.description: Welcome to the world of elements — explore anthropomorphized chemical elements and their 3D printed models.

home.referenceDesc: Below are the anthropomorphized designs and information cards for each element. Every element features a unique character design and scientific background.
home.elementsDesc: Click a card to view the 3D model and detailed information

detail.rotateHint: 🖱 Drag to rotate | Scroll to zoom | Right-drag to pan
